---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new personality or a substantial expansion of an existing one
title: "[Skill] "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Proposed skill

What should the new skill be called?

## Problem it solves

What real engineering behavior or failure mode does it address?

## How it differs

How is this meaningfully different from the existing personalities?

## Signature behavior

List the key questions, objections, and evidence requests this skill would use.

## Example prompts

Include a few realistic scenarios where the skill would be useful.
